scope: Battle Command top HUD and queue-summary display
steps: Enable queue mode and queue five selected-brigade commands
Verify initial command post shows chief-of-staff fatigue 0 and queue congestion +1 second
Issue queued commands, run 1x, withdraw, open After Action, and apply result
Verify command post shows chief-of-staff unavailable/fatigue 100 and reason text
Enable queue mode and queue five selected-brigade commands again
Verify queued transmission previews include command-post fatigue delay and queue congestion increases
Reset QA campaign and reset browser viewport

observations.firstBattleQueue: 予約指揮予約中5件一括混線 +1秒 / 参謀長 アルンハイム / 指揮疲労0で支障なし
observations.afterAction: 伝令評価 発令5件 / 遅延5件 / 混線5件 / 最長4秒
observations.secondBattleTopbar: 司令部 参謀長 アルンハイム 疲労100
observations.secondBattleQueueReason: 参謀長 アルンハイム / 参謀長不在扱い / 指揮疲労100で伝達+2秒/処理容量-2
observations.secondBattleTransmissionPreview: 伝令予測 5秒 + 混線2秒 / ... / 司令部疲労+2秒

checks.mobileQa: skipped: mobile/cellphone is outside the active target
